case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. PATRICK BOWEN

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BOWEN, PATRICK DBA PB WINES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 62518064) AS TO DEFENDANT BOWEN, PATRICK DBA PB WINES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOWEN, PATRICK DBA PB WINES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1080 AVENUE M, TREASURE ISLAND, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94130, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62576134)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62413967), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVED AUG-17-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOWEN, PATRICK DBA PB WINES
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 62494241) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BOWEN, PATRICK DBA PB WINES
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67814082)
